name: GOLFTEC Carrollwood
address: 13152 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33618
about: GOLFTEC Carrollwood is a specialized golf training center focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise swing feedback. Lessons are structured around a personalized improvement journey, starting with a Swing Evaluation to create a customized game plan. The center also offers club fitting services, fitting and selling golf clubs to optimize player performance. The environment is designed for focused practice and skill development, with a strong emphasis on measurable results through technology-coached training sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized improvement plans based on data-driven swing analysis
Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise feedback
Access to certified PGA coaches with award-winning instruction
Comprehensive services covering lessons, practice, and club fitting
Pro shop with 10% discount on retail golf gear

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or try equipment available at the center. GOLFTEC also offers club fitting services to help you find the perfect clubs for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at the facility, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Since GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than full simulator play, time for 18 holes would depend on the specific practice session or lesson structure.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for youth golfers beginning to learn the game with personalized instruction.
